project_type: React+Vite frontend with Express 5 + WebSocket backend board game
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsx for backend server
test_framework: No test framework found - manual verification only
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript compilation. 2. Run npm run build to ensure Vite builds successfully.
environment_constraints: No automated test suite available. Verification is limited to TypeScript type checking and Vite build.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) manages all game state. Online multiplayer uses WebSocket messages between client and server. Server broadcasts full game state to all clients after each action. Client-local UI state (recruitMode, moveMode, etc.) is separate from game state and must be manually reset. The GAME_STATE handler in the store is the single point where online state arrives and local UI flags should be synchronized.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/server/ - Express+WS server, src/utils/ - game logic functions, src/types/ - TypeScript types
